title: Debugging Integration Test Failures Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on debugging complex integration issues.

questions.question: Regarding the testing of software, what is the first step in debugging an 'Integration Test Failure'?
options: To read the error output carefully to determine the cause and location of the problem

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a integration-test-failure-debugging workflow?
options: Narrowing down the specific integration point where the failure is occurring, such as a database call
Recording a commit directly to the SQL database
Its only possible for SQL repositories
